title: Afraid of What?
editorialSummary: Common phobias grouped by the type of thing feared. False trail: Arachnophobia and Entomophobia both involve small creatures, but spiders are arachnids not insects — they belong to different groups. All phobia terms appear in standard psychological and medical references (DSM / ICD). Gephyrophobia (fear of bridges) and Claustrophobia (fear of enclosed spaces) are the most broadly known in their respective groups.

meta.gptRationale: The '-phobia' framing is obvious, but the Greek-derived terms require more vocabulary precision than typical easy-tier material.
